name: FBR Limited
summary: FBR Limited designs, develops, and commercializes robotic machines in Australia. It engages in developing the Hadrian X, a construction robot which builds the walls of a structure from 3D computer-aided design model and dynamic stabilisation technology which reacts to wind, vibration, and other environmental factors to enable precise positioning of objects over large distances outside. The company was formerly known as Fastbrick Robotics Limited and changed its name to FBR Limited. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is based in High Wycombe, Australia.
